Delve a pixel dungeon for ever-better loot.
Grey Mythic
Pixel art from the DawnLike tileset by DragonDePlatino & DawnBringer (CC-BY 4.0).
Choose your Hero
⚔️ Name Your Hero
Enter the name that will carry your deeds onto the global leaderboards.
View the Leaderboards
Leaderboards
The deepest, strongest, and richest heroes across everyone who plays.
💾 Save Slots
Keep as many heroes as you like. Load a slot to play it, or start a new adventure in a fresh slot — your current game is saved automatically.
↻ Start a New Run?
This starts over in your current save slot (Slot 1) and permanently deletes the hero saved there. This can't be undone.
Want to keep this hero and start a second one? Use Save Slots and pick a fresh slot instead — nothing gets wiped.
☁️ Cloud Save
Optional. Sign in to link your save slots to your account so you can carry your heroes across devices. Your progress still saves on this device either way.
